questions.question: What's the actual impact of fees and slippage on retail-size paper-traded crypto strategies?
questions.summary: ~$1/round-trip on $200 positions (0.25% taker both legs). Gross +$1,085 became net -$782 on the 3-month backtest — the delta is the answer. Fees erase thin edges.

questions.question: Which parameter ranges of Bollinger and MA-crossover are robust to regime shifts, and which are overfit?
questions.summary: None are robust: all 12 variants with n>100 negative over 6 months net of costs. Per-regime conditioning untested (rung 3).

questions.question: (Emergent) Do constraints or strategies determine outcomes at this scale?
questions.summary: Constraints dominate: 99.6% of candidate signals died on cooldown/exposure/concurrency. Candidate fitness = edge per constraint slot, not signal frequency.

questions.question: Does sentiment data (Fear & Greed) improve technical strategies, or is it noise?
questions.summary: Layer 2 (context) never went live; deferred past Phase 1b per one-factor-at-a-time.

questions.question: Does the walk-forward tuner produce variants that hold up out-of-sample?
questions.summary: tune.py never built; compare.py (the scoring instrument) now exists. Blocked on the candidate roster accumulating live trades.

learnings.claim: GitHub Actions free-tier */5 cron on a small/inactive public repo delivers only ~3-5% of scheduled runs (~24/day vs 288 expected), making the 95% uptime gate unclearable on that platform.
learnings.evidence: 2026-05-23 migration entry (69 of 1,712 = 4.0% invocation) and 2026-05-18 entry (~60-min actual cadence)

learnings.claim: Migrating the cron to a Hetzner CX22 VPS clears the 95% uptime architectural gate; the VPS ran with zero >1h gaps over the 47-day operator absence.
learnings.evidence: 2026-07-02 47-day-gap entry: runs 84->11,574 all status='ok', Phase 2 gate 1 mechanically satisfied

learnings.claim: Elapsed calendar time contributes almost nothing to learning; nearly everything the project learned was produced in ~48 hours (2026-07-16/17), and 11 weeks of calendar bought only one day of live A/B trade-days.
learnings.evidence: 2026-07-17 'Correction: the sequence was valuable; the duration was not' entry

learnings.claim: The canon-first sequence (kill textbook strategies on the record before aggressive iteration) earned its keep even though the elapsed duration did not.
Both base strategies (Bollinger, MA-crossover) are net-negative over a real 6-month window; every variant with n>100 loses money and the only positives run on n=3/n=13 noise.
learnings.evidence: 2026-07-02 'Retire Bollinger and MA-crossover' entry: net -$1,719.44, bollinger_default n=539 -$636.75

learnings.claim: Realistic constraints (cooldown/exposure/concurrency) dominate strategy behavior, rejecting ~99.6% of candidate signals.
learnings.evidence: 2026-07-02 6-month replay: 1,371 trades of 390,519 candidates; 2026-07-16 null-variant entry (constraint layer)

learnings.claim: The shared position ceiling means adding variants does not add exposure; parallel registration of all 12 variants moved P&L only through selection within the cap.
The five LLM-surfaced candidates all lost money net of fees; weekend_illiquidity_momentum was gross-positive (Sharpe 1.51, 49.4% win) but fee-negative, replicating the fee-floor failure shape.
Maker fills beat taker fills in 12/12 matched pairs (mean +$0.14/slot, ~$0.21-0.24 fees saved/trade, 0-4 fill loss per ~150), validating cost engineering as a reusable lever.

The project's first net-positive cell (maker/72h/tp8%/sl4%, +$0.031/slot over 146 trades) is statistically indistinguishable from zero and is the best of 24 cells, so its true expectation is likely negative.
The gauntlet's detection power is near zero where interesting edges live: a true +0.17%-net edge passes only 32% at n=100 (and less with more data); reliable detection starts ~+0.6% net.
learnings.next_check: when costs, constraints, or the kill bar change

learnings.claim: The +0.3% kill bar has a 21% false-positive rate at n=7, quantitatively vindicating the n<30 quarantine rule.
Sub-bar real edges are unrecoverable one-at-a-time because the fee floor binds per deployed rule, not per signal — the strongest argument for a combination/netting stage.
learnings.evidence: 2026-07-18 power-calibration entry; 2026-07-18 critique-driven reorder entry (netting insight)

learnings.claim: Blind-elicitation with fresh unanchored context produced more validated learning in one day than any week of inside work (ceiling study, power calibration, netting, slow-band prior, cost decomposition all trace to it).
learnings.evidence: 2026-07-18 'Outside eyes institutionalized' and 'Four rulings from the learning-maximization review' entries

learnings.claim: The crypto predictability ceiling sits at ~the cost floor at 24h and rises with horizon, shifting the program from prospecting to extraction engineering.
Cost floor is per-symbol and partly a choice: Alpaca spreads run 0.07% (BTC) to 0.42% (SOL) vs Binance <=0.015%; only slippage requires real trades to measure.
The kill-criterion v1 draft was flawed (treated cost as constant, never consulted the power study, AND-conjunction gave a survival dial, units error, no clock/restart rule) and was superseded by v2.
learnings.evidence: 2026-07-18 critique-driven reorder entry; 2026-07-19 ratification of v2

learnings.claim: Short-horizon crypto continuation (<=24h, taker) has gross edge below the cost floor at every horizon <=12h and is archived.
Crypto momentum in 2024-26 is negative/reverting (0/9 cells, -12.4% directional); equity time-series momentum also lost to drift in-window (0/9 cells).
learnings.evidence: 2026-07-20 'The equity sky check, sober reading' entry

learnings.claim: The only persistently positive equity signal (cross-sectional 6-1 spread, +sign in all four windows, pooled t~1.9) did not survive survivorship correction: corrected pooled +1.25%/mo t=+1.02 with 2020-21 flipping sign.
Survivorship bias is fixable at zero data cost because Alpaca serves full daily bars for delisted names (SIVB, FRC, SBNY, BBBYQ, MULN recovered).
learnings.evidence: 2026-07-20 B2 corrected-archive registration; confirmed by 2026-07-20 corrected re-score (978->2,494 usable symbols)

learnings.claim: The real case for the equity program (E2) is breadth and falsification-throughput (thousands of names, ~0.05% costs, decades of regimes), not sky-check magnitude — it holds even if the sky check came back flat.
learnings.evidence: 2026-07-20 'The equity sky check, sober reading' and 2026-07-20 'E2 OPENED' entries

learnings.claim: The equity pipeline is validated for research: cross-sectional 12-1 momentum was detected on the corrected archive with the right sign and the textbook momentum-crash signature (-17.3%/yr in 2020-21, +28.9%/yr in 2024-26).
learnings.evidence: 2026-07-20 'E2 round zero: pipeline VALIDATED' entry (umd-crosscheck and umd-identity reports follow)

learnings.claim: Round zero's +14.9%/yr magnitude is not a deployable edge: far above the pre-registered 2-4%/yr band, only marginally significant (t=1.57, n=59), on a modified-protocol pass (5 years, not the registered 20+ due to Alpaca history reaching only ~2021).
learnings.evidence: 2026-07-20 'E2 round zero' entry and its referee amendments

learnings.claim: The 59-month equity test window is typical, not an outlier: French UMD 2021-26 +0.47%/mo vs 1927-present +0.62%/mo (z=-0.26).
The identity of the measured equity object is momentum, evidenced chiefly by storm-conditional co-movement with UMD (+0.49 in high-|UMD| months vs +0.09 calm), not the crash timing alone.
learnings.next_check: only if construction precision ever matters (e.g., factor-neutralizing a real spec)

learnings.claim: No OHLCV-only price/volume factor clears the best-of-4 hurdle (~1.7t) on the top-500-liquid large-cap universe at monthly horizon; the equity sky for this instrument is as thin as crypto's.
The claude.ai Gmail connector is draft-only (cannot send) and Hetzner blocks outbound port 465 but leaves 587 open, so digest email must go via SMTP 587/STARTTLS.
No real credential was ever committed to the repo; the May 2026 .env exposure surface was the session transcript, not the repository.
Logging incidents late is costly: the May 2026 .env exposure record written ~60 days late lost the details (exact date, echoing command, transcript persistence) a real postmortem would need.
The weekly Friday adversarial review discipline slipped for 47 days (last ran W21, 2026-05-23), the exact failure the review itself said would prove the methodology dead if it slipped.
The low-vol-60 factor in equity round one was scored by the wrong (raw-excess) metric rather than its risk-adjusted nature, so its verdict does not yet stand.
learnings.evidence: 2026-07-23 'E2 round one' entry (caveat banked, re-score required)

hypotheses.commitment: By end of the first calendar week of cron operation, the runs table should contain ~2,016 rows with status='ok' (90%+ success rate); if below 90%, investigate before Week 2 strategy-roster review.
hypotheses.source_entry: 2026-05-17 — Curriculum anchor is first cron run
hypotheses.resolution: 2026-05-23 found 69 of 1,712 = 4.0% invocation (GitHub throttling); original hypothesis amended to separate invocation vs code-success rates and cron migrated to VPS

hypotheses.commitment: By end of Week 2, the operator commits a decision-log entry naming one of three scheduler options (a/b/c); if none committed by end of Week 2, the Week 3 build does not begin until it is made.
hypotheses.source_entry: 2026-05-18 — GH cron cadence does not match assumed 5-min
hypotheses.resolution: Effectively resolved by the 2026-05-23 decision to migrate the cron to a Hetzner VPS (chose option (c)-shape: move to a real scheduler)

hypotheses.commitment: By end of Week 2, Claude-mediated synthesis produces either (a) a defensible justification for keeping Bollinger and MA-crossover naming which modern-filter criteria they pass/fail, or (b) a defensible alternative roster; if neither, Week 3 starts a postmortem on the reframe itself.
hypotheses.resolution: Resolved on 6-month evidence in the 2026-07-02 entry retiring both base strategies with a defensible negative and deferring replacement candidates to the next phase

hypotheses.commitment: The residual (24h+maker fills and reversion-shaped 2-8 week specs) resolves by 2026-08-31, gated on the real-money RTC measurement; if the RTC cannot run by 2026-08-15, the residual resolves on the assumed 0.6% cost figure treated as adverse.
hypotheses.source_entry: 2026-07-20 — K1 adjudication: short-horizon crypto archived, residual on a dated clock

hypotheses.commitment: By 2026-08-31, and every 6 months thereafter, run the ceiling study per a locked analysis plan; futility trigger fires if the one-sided 90% upper CB of net_edge is below zero at every horizon.
hypotheses.source_entry: 2026-07-19 — Operator ratification: kill criterion v2 ratified (v2 draft from 2026-07-18 critique-driven reorder entry)

hypotheses.commitment: First scheduled execution-cost/ceiling study by 2026-08-31 under a locked analysis plan; restart only with a materially new data source or >=50% RTC reduction.
hypotheses.source_entry: 2026-07-19 — Operator ratification: all pending drafts approved

hypotheses.commitment: If the corrected re-score flips the cross-sectional sign or collapses pooled t toward zero, the E2 rationale formally reverts to breadth-and-throughput-only and round zero proceeds anyway.
hypotheses.source_entry: 2026-07-20 — B2 corrected-archive registration (pre-commitment before corrected numbers exist)
hypotheses.resolution: 2026-07-20 corrected re-score: pooled t collapsed to +1.02 and 2020-21 flipped sign, so E2 rationale reverted to breadth-and-throughput only and round zero proceeded; no improvised decision required

hypotheses.commitment: Round zero (equity positive control) DETECTION = landing inside or above the literature band (~2-4%/yr over benchmark, post-2000, decaying) with the sign right at the significance 20+ years of monthly data affords; a noisy positive is NOT detection.
hypotheses.source_entry: 2026-07-20 — The equity sky check, sober reading (round-zero pre-registration)
hypotheses.resolution: 2026-07-20 round zero detected 12-1 momentum with right sign and crash signature; pipeline validated for research use, though the pass was modified-protocol (n=59mo, not 20+ years) and magnitude (+14.9%/yr, t=1.57) is above-band and distrusted

hypotheses.commitment: Phase 2 requires all three gates: (1) >=95% uptime over prior 4 weeks, (2) at least one A/B-validated promotion (p<0.05, 100+ trades), (3) positive 30-day P&L or explicit written override.
hypotheses.source_entry: 2026-04-26 — Three explicit gates for Phase 2 entry

hypotheses.commitment: Real money returns to paper (or archives) when any of: drawdown below $700 (-30%), real-vs-paper variance >50% over any 2-week window, or 8 weeks elapsed (mandatory review week).

Reverse-direction check on the adaptive clause: each invocation must record whether the revision makes the project look better/worse/neutral, and if the last two also landed on 'better', the Friday review argues against the next one before it takes effect.
hypotheses.source_entry: 2026-04-26 — Claude as epistemological backbone (adaptive clause future-self letter, drafted 2026-07-16)
